title: phaius nanus
intro: Phaius nanus, also known as the miniature phaius or Chinese orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phaius nanus include reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used topically as a poultice or ointment.
